tools_called.name: verify_insurance
tools_called.result_summary: insurance status: in_network (Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO)

args.notes: In-network SLP coverage (Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO) requires prior authorization. Obtain authorization before any slot is found, held, or scheduled.
args.title: Obtain prior authorization before scheduling: Emma Lee

args.body:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Priya Nair on behalf of Emma — we're glad you reached out and look forward to supporting her. Before we can schedule an initial SLP evaluation, our billing team will need to verify Emma's benefits and obtain any required prior authorization from Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO, which can take a few business days. Once authorization is confirmed, a team member will reach out to coordinate a time that works for your family, keeping your preference for after-school Tuesdays or Thursdays in mind. We appreciate your patience and will be in touch as soon as we have an update.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team submits a prior authorization request to Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO for Emma Lee's SLP evaluation before any slot is identified or scheduled, and notifies the scheduling team once authorization is confirmed.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Priya Nair on behalf of Emma — we're glad you reached out and look forward to supporting her. Before we can schedule an initial SLP evaluation, our billing team will need to verify Emma's benefits and obtain any required prior authorization from Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO, which can take a few business days. Once authorization is confirmed, a team member will reach out to coordinate a time that works for your family, keeping your preference for after-school Tuesdays or Thursdays in mind. We appreciate your patience and will be in touch as soon as we have an update.
items.decision_rationale: This is a P2 new physician referral with verified active in-network coverage; however, prior authorization is required before scheduling per policy, so no appointment time may be implied or held. The draft acknowledges receipt warmly, communicates the authorization step transparently, and notes the family's scheduling preferences without committing to a slot.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Speech/language concern; child reportedly becoming more clingy since father 'started getting rough with him during weekends' — possible physical abuse or unsafe caregiving

args.reason: Possible safeguarding concern in item_2: Mother is requesting a speech therapy evaluation for her 6-year-old son Leo, and incidentally disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends,' raising a safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead escalation.

args.notes: Escalated P0. Mother is requesting a speech therapy evaluation for her 6-year-old son Leo, and incidentally disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends,' raising a safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead escalation. Do not provide investigative advice; clinical lead to review immediately per safeguarding policy.
args.title: Same-hour safeguarding review: Leo Gomez

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. We received your message and a team member will be following up with you by phone shortly. Please know that someone will be in touch soon.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review this P0 safeguarding disclosure within the hour and contact Maria Gomez at 555-0102 per safeguarding protocol before any scheduling steps are taken.
items.draft_reply: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. We received your message and a team member will be following up with you by phone shortly. Please know that someone will be in touch soon.

escalation.reason: Possible safeguarding concern in item_2: Mother is requesting a speech therapy evaluation for her 6-year-old son Leo, and incidentally disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends,' raising a safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead escalation.

items.decision_rationale: This is a P0 safeguarding escalation: the caller incidentally disclosed potential physical harm to a minor (Leo Gomez), which requires immediate clinical lead review under safeguarding policy. Per protocol, the draft reply is limited to a brief, neutral acknowledgment with no clinical content, no mention of the disclosure, no scheduling language, and no investigative questions. Insurance and scheduling are not addressed at this stage, as safeguarding supersedes all other workflow steps.

args.notes: Kaiser HMO verified out_of_network for Owen Brooks. Hold a benefits conversation before any slot is held or scheduled.
args.title: Discuss out-of-network benefits: Owen Brooks

args.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Helena Yu on behalf of Owen — we're glad you've reached out and look forward to supporting your family. Before we move forward with scheduling an OT evaluation, our billing team will need to connect with you to discuss Owen's Kaiser HMO coverage, as Kaiser is currently out of network with Cedar Kids Therapy, and we want to make sure you have a clear picture of your options before any next steps are taken. A team member will be in touch at the contact information provided to have that conversation. We appreciate your patience and look forward to speaking with you soon.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing contacts Rachel Brooks at 555-0103 or rachel.brooks@example.com to review out-of-network options for Kaiser HMO before any appointment slot is held or scheduling is discussed.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Helena Yu on behalf of Owen — we're glad you've reached out and look forward to supporting your family. Before we move forward with scheduling an OT evaluation, our billing team will need to connect with you to discuss Owen's Kaiser HMO coverage, as Kaiser is currently out of network with Cedar Kids Therapy, and we want to make sure you have a clear picture of your options before any next steps are taken. A team member will be in touch at the contact information provided to have that conversation. We appreciate your patience and look forward to speaking with you soon.
items.decision_rationale: This is a P2 new referral with no identity concerns or missing information, but Kaiser HMO is confirmed out-of-network for Cedar Kids Therapy, requiring a benefits conversation with the family prior to scheduling per policy. No prior authorization flag applies here since the out-of-network status takes precedence; the draft accurately reflects that billing must engage first and avoids any implication that an appointment is set or pending.

args.notes: The name on this message ("Carla Mendez") does not match the guardian on the child's record; confirm the requester is an authorized guardian before acting or sharing any information.
args.title: Verify requester authorization: Mateo Ramirez

args.notes: In-network PT coverage (Aetna PPO) requires prior authorization. Obtain authorization before any slot is found, held, or scheduled. Existing patient record found — dedupe.
args.title: Obtain prior authorization before scheduling: Mateo Ramirez

args.body: Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy regarding Mateo. We received your message and appreciate you sharing that information with us. A team member will be in touch shortly to confirm a few details before we proceed. Please feel free to call us at your convenience if you have any questions in the meantime.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk must first verify that Carla Mendez is an authorized guardian on Mateo Ramirez's record (and reactivate the record if inactive) before sharing any information or taking further action; once authorization is confirmed, billing should initiate prior authorization with Aetna PPO for the PT evaluation before any scheduling steps occur.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy regarding Mateo. We received your message and appreciate you sharing that information with us. A team member will be in touch shortly to confirm a few details before we proceed. Please feel free to call us at your convenience if you have any questions in the meantime.
items.decision_rationale: An identity and authorization concern is flagged, making it the highest-priority non-safeguarding issue per policy; the draft is therefore limited to a neutral acknowledgment with no record, coverage, or appointment details disclosed. Additionally, active in-network coverage does not permit scheduling because prior authorization is required first, which must be obtained before any slot is offered or held.

args.notes: Parent is asking for clinical advice (Parent is asking whether it is developmentally normal for a 4-year-old to have difficulty producing R sounds and whether they should seek evaluation now or wait.). Policy forbids advice by message; offer a screening/evaluation instead.
args.title: Route clinical question to screening: Ava

args.body: Hi, thank you for reaching out about Ava! That's a great question, and we completely understand wanting some guidance before taking next steps. While we aren't able to share clinical opinions by message, the best way to get a clear picture of where Ava is developmentally is through a speech-language screening or evaluation with one of our SLPs. A team member will be in touch to walk you through scheduling options and what to expect from the process.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team to reach out to Ava's parent via portal to offer a speech-language screening or evaluation appointment, and collect any remaining intake information needed to open a new patient record.
items.draft_reply: Hi, thank you for reaching out about Ava! That's a great question, and we completely understand wanting some guidance before taking next steps. While we aren't able to share clinical opinions by message, the best way to get a clear picture of where Ava is developmentally is through a speech-language screening or evaluation with one of our SLPs. A team member will be in touch to walk you through scheduling options and what to expect from the process.
items.decision_rationale: This is a clinical question (P2) from a parent seeking developmental guidance about articulation; per policy, clinical opinions must not be provided by message, and the appropriate next step is to offer a screening or evaluation. No insurance verification has been performed and no hold is pending, so no scheduling language is appropriate yet. The reply is warm and redirects to a clinical pathway without answering the clinical question.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: speech delay in a school-age child

args.notes: Referral incomplete. Missing: date of birth, guardian contact, insurance. Contact referring provider/family before intake can proceed.
args.title: Obtain missing referral details: Sam Taylor

args.body: Thank you for reaching out on behalf of Sam Taylor regarding a speech-language pathology evaluation. We received the referral from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics, but we're missing a few details we'll need before we can move forward with intake: Sam's date of birth, a parent or guardian name and contact number, and insurance information including member ID. Once we have those details, a team member will be happy to get the process started.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should contact Dr. Omar Keene's office at Lakeview Pediatrics by phone or fax to collect Sam Taylor's date of birth, parent/guardian name and contact information, and insurance details before intake can proceed.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out on behalf of Sam Taylor regarding a speech-language pathology evaluation. We received the referral from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics, but we're missing a few details we'll need before we can move forward with intake: Sam's date of birth, a parent or guardian name and contact number, and insurance information including member ID. Once we have those details, a team member will be happy to get the process started.
items.decision_rationale: This is a P2 missing-paperwork case: the referral is incomplete and intake cannot begin without the date of birth, guardian contact, and insurance information. No identity concern or safeguarding flag was raised, so standard missing-information handling applies. No appointment hold exists, so no scheduling language is needed.

tools_called.name: find_slots
tools_called.result_summary: 2 matching slots; earliest 2026-04-30T11:00:00-07:00 with Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP

args.notes: In-network SLP referral for Isabella Lopez. Pending-review hold placed for 2026-04-30T11:00:00-07:00 with Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP; confirm with family.
args.title: Confirm held slot: Isabella Lopez

args.body: Hola, Ana. Gracias por comunicarse con Cedar Kids Therapy. Hemos recibido su solicitud de evaluación de habla para Isabella y verificamos que su cobertura Medicaid está activa y en nuestra red. Tenemos un horario pendiente el 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m. con Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP, quien habla español, y un miembro de nuestro equipo se comunicará con usted al 555-0107 para confirmar la cita. ¡Estamos aquí para ayudarles!

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff calls Ana Lopez at 555-0107 to confirm and formally book the pending April 30 evaluation slot with Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP, and creates a new patient record for Isabella Lopez.
items.draft_reply: Hola, Ana. Gracias por comunicarse con Cedar Kids Therapy. items.decision_rationale: This is a P2 new referral with verified active in-network Medicaid coverage, no prior authorization required, no identity concerns, and no missing information, so scheduling can proceed. A pending hold exists with a Spanish-speaking SLP matching the family's preference, and per policy the draft notes it is pending confirmation rather than booked. Reply is in Spanish per the family's language preference.

args.notes: Parent needs to cancel and reschedule Noah's same-day 3pm OT appointment because he is ill. Existing patient record located. Staff to action; agent does not book.
args.title: Same-day scheduling request: Noah Patel

args.body: Hi there, thank you for letting us know so quickly — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well! We've noted that he won't be able to make today's 3pm OT appointment, and a team member will reach out to you shortly at 555-0108 or by email to get him rescheduled. We hope Noah feels better soon!

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should immediately mark today's 3pm OT slot as cancelled for Noah Patel (DOB 2017-11-02), release the slot, and contact the parent via phone (555-0108) or email to reschedule at the earliest available opening.
items.draft_reply: Hi there, thank you for letting us know so quickly — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well! We've noted that he won't be able to make today's 3pm OT appointment, and a team member will reach out to you shortly at 555-0108 or by email to get him rescheduled. We hope Noah feels better soon!
items.decision_rationale: This is a P1 same-day reschedule for an existing patient with no missing information, no identity concerns, and no insurance or authorization barriers — the priority is prompt cancellation of today's slot and rapid outreach to rebook. Per policy, agents do not book appointments, so the draft acknowledges the cancellation and sets the expectation that a team member will follow up to reschedule.
